name: Marelok
description: The Marelok combines the stopping power of a rifle with the portability of a pistol.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Marelok combines the stopping power of a rifle with the portability of a pistol.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed duplicate Marelok appearing in the market. Players who purchased this item have automatically received a refund.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.changes: The new Nightwatch Skin Pack will include skins for: Grinlok, Tonkor, Marelok, Brakk, Diriga, Dual Cleavers, Machete and Jat Kittag. Find them in the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Weapon skins for the Grinlok, Tonkor, Jat Kittag and Marelok are now available from Teshin!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lowered the damage of the Vaykor Marelok in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.1 + 16.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Day of the Dead now works on Vaykor Marelok.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed unique energy colors not applying to the Telos Akbolto and the Vaykor Marelok.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Marelok! Grineer Lever Action Secondary weapon! Find it in Clan Tech or the Market today.
